damage.value: trample d8+3 w/disadvantage (hand, close) or ice-tusks d8+7 w/disadvantage (reach, forceful, messy, crude, 1 piercing)

instinct.value: to amuse itself at the expense of others

system.concept: A bored, can't-lie mammoth-spirit emissary whose idleness has soured into cruelty.
system.tags: solitary, huge, spirit, construct, cautious, devious
system.qualities: Tethered to its dome but far-ranging; perfect memory; unable to lie. Armor 1 (lacks organs).
system.description: The Rime Lords created these mighty spirits to act as emissaries and spies. A few still remain, tethered to the meditation-halls in which they were made but roaming the Whitefangs in search of novelty and diversion. They have grown bored in their masters' absence, and from boredom has grown a subtle cruelty. The people of the Whitefangs treat them with respect, for they are still the emissaries of the Rime Lords — but they also know better than to trust their counsel.

items.name: Manifest a mammoth-like form of freezing mist and ice (harmed only by salt, fire, heat)
Suck the strength and warmth from anyone it tramples
Reveal just enough to cause trouble
